_doc: Static per-vault Contract & Token Safety mapping. by_pool maps a vault's DeFiLlama pool id -> {"points": Audit Score 0-15, "protocol_audit": Protocol Score 0-10, "token_audit": Vault Score 0-5}, where points == protocol_audit + token_audit. Only points enters safety_score; the subfields ride along for transparency. An absent/empty entry scores 0. This file is the source of record for the per-vault audit scores. research-audit does NOT feed this factor (advisory-only in recommend).
